A C D E G H J K M P Q S T 

A

ACE - Static variable in class Card
Rank value for an Ace.

C

Card - Class in <Unnamed>
Represents a single playing card with a rank and suit.
Card() - Constructor for class Card
Creates a default card, the Ace of Spades.
Card(Card) - Constructor for class Card
Creates a new card with the same rank and suit as another card.
Card(int, int) - Constructor for class Card
Creates a card with a specified rank and suit.
CLUBS - Static variable in class Card
Suit value for Clubs.

D

deal() - Method in class Deck
Removes and returns one random card from the deck.
Dealer - Class in <Unnamed>
Represents a dealer that owns a deck and deals cards from it.
Dealer() - Constructor for class Dealer
Creates a dealer with a new full deck.
deals(int) - Method in class Dealer
Deals up to the requested number of cards from the deck.
Deck - Class in <Unnamed>
Represents a standard deck of 52 playing cards.
Deck() - Constructor for class Deck
Creates a full standard deck with all suits and ranks.
Deck(Deck) - Constructor for class Deck
Creates a deep copy of another deck.
DIAMONDS - Static variable in class Card
Suit value for Diamonds.
doubles(LinkedList<Card>) - Static method in class Game
Checks whether the two newest cards in the pile have the same rank.
Driver - Class in <Unnamed>
Runs one Egyptian Rat Slap simulation.
Driver() - Constructor for class Driver
Creates a Driver object.

E

equals(Card) - Method in class Card
Compares this card's rank with another card's rank.

G

Game - Class in <Unnamed>
Simulates a simplified game of Egyptian Rat Slap using players, a dealer, and a center pile.
Game() - Constructor for class Game
Creates a default game with two players and deals the full deck evenly between them.
Game(int) - Constructor for class Game
Creates a game with the given number of players and deals the full deck among them.
getDealer() - Method in class Game
Returns the dealer used by this game.
getHand() - Method in class Player
Returns this player's hand.
getPattern() - Method in class Game
Returns the valid slap patterns for this game.
getPattern() - Method in class Player
Returns the slap pattern assigned to this player.
getPile() - Method in class Game
Returns the current center pile.
getPlayerNum() - Method in class Player
Returns this player's number.
getPlayers() - Method in class Game
Returns the list of players in turn order.
getRank() - Method in class Card
Returns this card's rank.
getSuit() - Method in class Card
Returns this card's suit.

H

HEARTS - Static variable in class Card
Suit value for Hearts.

J

JACK - Static variable in class Card
Rank value for a Jack.

K

KING - Static variable in class Card
Rank value for a King.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class Driver
Creates and plays one game, then prints the winning player.

P

play() - Method in class Game
Runs the Egyptian Rat Slap simulation until one player has all 52 cards.
playCard() - Method in class Player
Removes and returns the card at the top of this player's hand.
Player - Class in <Unnamed>
Represents one player in the Egyptian Rat Slap game.
Player(int, LinkedList<Card>, String) - Constructor for class Player
Creates a player with a player number, a hand of cards, and a slap pattern.

Q

QUEEN - Static variable in class Card
Rank value for a Queen.

S

sandwich(LinkedList<Card>) - Static method in class Game
Checks whether the newest card matches the card two positions below it.
setRank(int) - Method in class Card
Sets this card's rank.
setSuit(int) - Method in class Card
Sets this card's suit.
size() - Method in class Dealer
Returns the number of cards left in the dealer's deck.
size() - Method in class Deck
Returns the number of cards currently in the deck.
slaps(LinkedList<Card>) - Method in class Player
Checks whether this player should slap the current pile based on their assigned pattern.
SPADES - Static variable in class Card
Suit value for Spades.

T

topBottom(LinkedList<Card>) - Static method in class Game
Checks whether the newest card in the pile matches the first card played in the pile.
toString() - Method in class Card
Returns this card as readable text.
toString() - Method in class Dealer
Returns the dealer's remaining deck as a String.
toString() - Method in class Deck
Returns the cards in the deck as readable text.
toString() - Method in class Player
Returns a String containing this player's number, hand, and pattern.
